config.script:
#include "50509"
'getCurrentRKSId #include "50120"
'lista rejestrów i suma płatności zrealizowanych w danym rejestrze ' function bqry_stan_kasybanku_rejestrami(strRejIdObjs) dim strSQL strSQL = _ "select 'c_idrej'=n5rejestrdok.idobj, 'c_nazwarej'=max(n5rejestrdok.strNazwa),'c_stanewid'=isnull(sum(curKwotaEwid),0.0), " +_ "'c_stan'=isnull(sum(curKwotaStan),0.0),'c_typrej'=max(n5rejestrdok.eTyp),'c_waluta'=max(n5jednostka.strSkrot) " +_ "from n5platnosc right outer join n5rejestrdok on n5platnosc.pRejestrDok = n5rejestrdok.idobj " +_ "join n5jednostka on n5rejestrdok.wrefParam1 = n5jednostka.idobj " +_ #ifdef _ALMA_TREND "where n5rejestrdok.pRokKsieg = " + CStr(getCurrentRKSId()) + " and n5platnosc.eStatus=N5PLATNOSC_ZREALIZOWANA and n5rejestrdok.eTyp in (N5REJESTRDOK_BANKOWY,N5REJESTRDOK_KASOWY) " #else "where n5platnosc.eStatus=N5PLATNOSC_ZREALIZOWANA and n5rejestrdok.eTyp in (N5REJESTRDOK_BANKOWY,N5REJESTRDOK_KASOWY) " #endif
if strRejIdObjs <> "" then strSQL = strSQL + "and n5rejestrdok.idobj in (" + strRejIdObjs + ") " end if strSQL = strSQL + " group by n5rejestrdok.idobj order by 2"
bqry_stan_kasybanku_rejestrami = strSQL end function
'aktywne dostawy (dostawy nierozchodowane) ze wskazanego magazynu function bqry_gm_aktywne_dostawy_mag(byval idMag,byval idProdukt,byval idOpak,byval nNumOpMag,byval strOrder)
if strOrder = "" then strOrder = " gms_nNumOp, gms_nLP " end if
dim znak:znak = ">=" if nNumOpMag > 0 then znak = "<" end if
bqry_gm_aktywne_dostawy_mag = doc_.afc.convert.formatter( _ "select gms_nNumOp, gms_nLP, gms_curCena, gms_curIlosc , gms_dDataWazn from n5gmstan where gms_pMag=%1 and gms_pProd=%2 and gms_pOpak=%3 and gms_nNumOp %5 %4 order by %6 ") _ (idMag)(idProdukt)(idOpak)(nNumOpMag)(znak)(strOrder).Done() end function
'aktywne dostawy (dostawy nierozchodowane) z wszystkich magazynów function bqry_gm_aktywne_dostawy(byval idProdukt,byval idOpak,byval nNumOpMag) bqry_gm_aktywne_dostawy = doc_.afc.convert.formatter( _ "select gms_pMag,gms_nNumOp, gms_nLP, gms_curCena, gms_curIlosc, gms_dDataWazn from n5gmstan where gms_pProd=%1 and gms_pOpak=%2 and gms_nNumOp >= %3 order by gms_nNumOp, gms_nLP ") _ (idProdukt)(idOpak)(nNumOpMag).Done() end function
'where dla wybor dokumentu do korekty function bqry_where_for_pop_for_korekta(byval nTypRej) dim strWhere:strWhere = "(n5sprzedaz.pFaktura=0) and (n5sprzedaz.idobj not in (select pPopSprzed from n5sprzedaz))" 'w zaleznosci od typu korekty wybieramy co korygujemy select case nTypRej case N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_FAKT_SP strWhere = strWhere + " and (n5sprzedaz.pRejestrDok in (select idobj from n5rejestrdok where eTyp in (N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_FAKT_SP,N5REJESTRDOK_FAKT_SP)))" #ifdef ENABLE_DB11 trans_.var(GVAR_CURRENT_REJESTR_TYP) = "N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_FAKT_SP,N5REJESTRDOK_FAKT_SP" #endif case N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_RACH strWhere = strWhere + " and (n5sprzedaz.pRejestrDok in (select idobj from n5rejestrdok where eTyp in (N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_RACH,N5REJESTRDOK_RACH)))" #ifdef ENABLE_DB11 trans_.var(GVAR_CURRENT_REJESTR_TYP) = "N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_RACH,N5REJESTRDOK_RACH" #endif case N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_PARAGON strWhere = strWhere + " and (n5sprzedaz.pRejestrDok in (select idobj from n5rejestrdok where eTyp in (N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_PARAGON,N5REJESTRDOK_PARAGON)))" #ifdef ENABLE_DB11 trans_.var(GVAR_CURRENT_REJESTR_TYP) = "N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_PARAGON,N5REJESTRDOK_PARAGON" #endif case N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_FAKT_EXP strWhere = strWhere + " and (n5sprzedaz.pRejestrDok in (select idobj from n5rejestrdok where eTyp in (N5REJESTRDOK_FAKT_EXP,N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_FAKT_EXP)))" #ifdef ENABLE_DB11 trans_.var(GVAR_CURRENT_REJESTR_TYP) = "N5REJESTRDOK_FAKT_EXP,N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_FAKT_EXP" #endif case N5REJESTRDOK_KOREKTA_WDT strWhere = strWhere + " and (n5sprzedaz.pRejestrDok in (select idobj from n5rejestrdok where eTyp in (N5REJESTRDOK_WDT,N5REJESTRDOK_KOREKTA_WDT)))" #ifdef ENABLE_DB11 trans_.var(GVAR_CURRENT_REJESTR_TYP) = "N5REJESTRDOK_WDT,N5REJESTRDOK_KOREKTA_WDT" #endif case N5REJESTRDOK_FAKTURA_ZALICZKOWA_KOR strWhere = strWhere + " and (n5sprzedaz.pRejestrDok in (select idobj from n5rejestrdok where eTyp in (N5REJESTRDOK_FAKTURA_ZALICZKOWA,N5REJESTRDOK_FAKTURA_ZALICZKOWA_KOR)))" #ifdef ENABLE_DB11 trans_.var(GVAR_CURRENT_REJESTR_TYP) = "N5REJESTRDOK_FAKTURA_ZALICZKOWA,N5REJESTRDOK_FAKTURA_ZALICZKOWA_KOR" #endif case N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_DOSTAWA strWhere = strWhere + " and (n5sprzedaz.pRejestrDok in (select idobj from n5rejestrdok where eTyp in (N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_DOSTAWA,N5REJESTRDOK_DOSTAWA)))" #ifdef ENABLE_DB11 trans_.var(GVAR_CURRENT_REJESTR_TYP) = "N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_DOSTAWA,N5REJESTRDOK_DOSTAWA" #endif end select bqry_where_for_pop_for_korekta = strWhere end function
function bqry_where_for_pop_for_korekta_zakup(byval nTypRej) dim strWhere:strWhere = "(n5zakup.idobj not in (select pPopZakup from n5zakup))" 'w zaleznosci od typu korekty wybieramy co korygujemy select case nTypRej case N5REJESTRDOK_KOREKTA_WNT strWhere = strWhere + " and (n5zakup.pRejestrDok in (select idobj from n5rejestrdok where eTyp in (N5REJESTRDOK_WNT,N5REJESTRDOK_KOREKTA_WNT)))" #ifdef ENABLE_DB11 trans_.var(GVAR_CURRENT_REJESTR_TYP) = "N5REJESTRDOK_WNT,N5REJESTRDOK_KOREKTA_WNT" #endif case N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_FAKT_ZAK_RR strWhere = strWhere + " and (n5zakup.pRejestrDok in (select idobj from n5rejestrdok where eTyp in (N5REJESTRDOK_FAKT_ZAK_RR,N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_FAKT_ZAK_RR)))" #ifdef ENABLE_DB11 trans_.var(GVAR_CURRENT_REJESTR_TYP) = "N5REJESTRDOK_FAKT_ZAK_RR,N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_FAKT_ZAK_RR" #endif case N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_FAKT_IMP strWhere = strWhere + " and (n5zakup.pRejestrDok in (select idobj from n5rejestrdok where eTyp in (N5REJESTRDOK_FAKT_IMP,N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_FAKT_IMP)))" #ifdef ENABLE_DB11 trans_.var(GVAR_CURRENT_REJESTR_TYP) = "N5REJESTRDOK_FAKT_IMP,N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_FAKT_IMP" #endif case N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_FAKT_ZAK strWhere = strWhere + " and (n5zakup.pRejestrDok in (select idobj from n5rejestrdok where eTyp in (N5REJESTRDOK_FAKT_ZAK,N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_FAKT_ZAK)))" #ifdef ENABLE_DB11 trans_.var(GVAR_CURRENT_REJESTR_TYP) = "N5REJESTRDOK_FAKT_ZAK,N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_FAKT_ZAK" #endif case N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_IMPORT_USLUG strWhere = strWhere + " and (n5zakup.pRejestrDok in (select idobj from n5rejestrdok where eTyp in (N5REJESTRDOK_IMPORT_USLUG,N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_IMPORT_USLUG)))" #ifdef ENABLE_DB11 trans_.var(GVAR_CURRENT_REJESTR_TYP) = "N5REJESTRDOK_IMPORT_USLUG,N5REJESTRDOK_KOR_IMPORT_USLUG" #endif end select bqry_where_for_pop_for_korekta_zakup = strWhere end function
'zapytanie dla kursora ADO zwracające stany magazynowe dla produktu, opakowania i opcjonalenie magazynu (ewentualnie kilku magazynow - idobj przedzielone przecinkami) 'jesli id_mag podamy -1 to wtedy dostaniemy kilka wierszy odpowiadajacych 'wszystkim magazynom w ktorych dany produkt jest function bqry_stan_mag_for_prod_opak(byval id_prod , byval id_opak , byval id_mag)
dim strMag
if instr(id_mag,",") = 0 then id_mag = clng(id_mag) if id_mag < 0 then strMag = " is not null " else strMag = " = " + cstr(id_mag) end if else strMag = " in ("+ id_mag +") " end if
bqry_stan_mag_for_prod_opak = doc_.afc.convert.formatter( _ " select " + vbNewLine + _ " 'c_mag'=t_1.strNazwa, " + vbNewLine + _ " 'id_mag'=t_1.idobj, " + vbNewLine + _ " 'c_ilosc_opak'=sum(t_0.gms_curIlosc), " + vbNewLine + _ " 'c_jedn_opak'=max(t_4.strSkrot), " + vbNewLine + _ " 'c_prec_opak'=max(t_4.nDokladnosc) " + vbNewLine + _ " from n5gmstan as t_0 " + vbNewLine + _ " inner join n5magazyn as t_1 on t_0.gms_pMag = t_1.IdObj " + vbNewLine + _ " inner join n5produkt as t_2 on t_0.gms_pProd = t_2.IdObj " + vbNewLine + _ " inner join n5opakowanie_produktu as t_3 on t_0.gms_pOpak = t_3.IdObj " + vbNewLine + _ " inner join n5jednostka as t_4 on t_3.pJednOpak = t_4.IdObj " + vbNewLine + _ " inner join n5jednostka as t_5 on t_2.pJednostkaEwid = t_5.IdObj " + vbNewLine + _ " where t_1.eTyp <> N5TYPMAG_ZWROTY and t_1.mag_eAktywny = 1 and " + vbNewLine + _ " (t_1.idobj %3) and " + vbNewLine + _ " (t_2.idobj = %1) and " + vbNewLine + _ " (t_3.idobj = %2) " + vbNewLine + _ " group by t_1.strNazwa,t_1.idobj " + vbNewLine + _ " having (sum(t_0.gms_curIlosc) is not null) " + vbNewLine + _ " order by c_mag " + vbNewLine ) _ (id_Prod)(id_Opak)(strMag).done()
end function
function bqry_stanmag_by_numop(byval pProdukt , byval pOpak , byval pMag , byval nNumOp) bqry_stanmag_by_numop = doc_.afc.convert.formatter( _ " select sum(gms_curIlosc) as iloscPo from n5gmstan " + vbNewLine + _ " where gms_pProd = %1 and gms_pOpak = %2 and gms_pMag = %3 " + vbNewLine + _ " and gms_nNumOp <= %4" + vbNewLine + _ " group by gms_pProd , gms_pOpak " + vbNewLine + _ " " + vbNewLine + _ " " ) _ .add(cstr(pProdukt.idobj)) _ .add(cstr(pOpak.idobj)) _ .add(cstr(pMag.idobj)) _ .add(cstr(nNumOp)) _ .done() end function
function bquery_stanmag_adors() bquery_stanmag_adors = "select gms_pProd , gms_pOpak , gms_pMag , sum(gms_curIlosc) as gms_Ilosc from n5gmstan group by gms_pProd,gms_pOpak,gms_pMag" end function
function bquery_stanmag_adorrs_orderer(byval idMag,byval bByName) dim strSQL : strSQL = "select gms_pProd,gms_pOpak, sum(gms_curIlosc) as gms_Ilosc " +_ "from n5gmstan join n5produkt on gms_pProd = n5produkt.idobj where gms_pMag=" + cstr(idMag) + " and n5produkt.eRodzaj = N5PRODUKT_TOWAR " +_ " group by gms_pProd,gms_pOpak order by " if bByName then strSQL = strSQL + " max(n5produkt.strNazwa)" else strSQL = strSQL + " max(n5produkt.strIndeks)" end if bquery_stanmag_adorrs_orderer = strSQL end function
#comment '--------------------------------------------- 'wartość magazynu idmag przed operacją nnumop #comment '--------------------------------------------- function bqry_wartmag_by_numop(byval idMag,byval nNumOp) bqry_wartmag_by_numop = "select 'c_wartosc'=isnull(sum(n5gmop.gmo_curWartosc),0) from n5gmop where " +_ "n5gmop.gmo_pMag="+cstr(idMag) + " and n5gmop.gmo_nNumOp < " + cstr(nNumOp) end function
' nDestFiltr: 1 - wszystkie aktywne ' 2 - lista wyboru (TYPEID_CHOICELIST) ' 3 - raport (TYPEID_SEARCHTYPE) ' nIdobjFiltr: idobj wybranego sposobu function bquery_where_for_produkt_filtr(byval nDestFiltr , byval nIdobjFiltr):bquery_where_for_produkt_filtr = ""
dim elem select case nDestFiltr case 1 bquery_where_for_produkt_filtr = " p_eAktywny=1" case 2 ' lista dim pLista:set pLista = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_CHOICELIST,nIdobjFiltr) bquery_where_for_produkt_filtr = " p_idobj in (0" for each elem in pLista.listElement bquery_where_for_produkt_filtr = bquery_where_for_produkt_filtr + "," + cstr(elem.idElement) next bquery_where_for_produkt_filtr = bquery_where_for_produkt_filtr + ")" case 3 'uruchom raport i pobierz z niego czesci 'zapytania
dim pRaport:set pRaport = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_SEARCHTYPE,nIdobjFiltr)
dim pPM: set pPM = doc_.getmodule(60114) dim strButtons: strButtons = "Zastosuj raport" dim strColumns, strDescription, strIds
dim strJoin, strWhere, strOrderBy, strGroupBy
if (pPM.get_search_filter_result(pRaport, _ strButtons, strColumns, _ strJoin, _ strWhere, _ strOrderBy, _ strGroupBy, _ strDescription, strIds)<>1) then exit function else bquery_where_for_produkt_filtr = " p_idobj in (select IdObj from n5produkt where " + strWhere + ")" end if #ifdef _IOW case 4 bquery_where_for_produkt_filtr = " (select isnull(sum(gms_curIlosc),0) from n5gmstan where gms_pProd = p_idobj and gms_pOpak = c_idobj and ( isnull(gms_pMag,-1) = [ID_MAGAZYN] or isnull(gms_pMag,-1) < 0)) > 0 " #endif
end select
end function
'--------------------------------------- 'wybór pracowników 'nDestFiltr: '1 - wszyscy aktywni (posiadający umowę) '2 - lista wyboru (TYPEID_CHOICELIST) '3 - raport (TYPEID_SEARCHTYPE) '--------------------------------------- function bquery_where_for_pracownik_filtr(byval nDestFiltr, byval nIdobjFiltr) : bquery_where_for_pracownik_filtr = "" dim elem select case nDestFiltr case 1 bquery_where_for_pracownik_filtr = " (1=1)" case 2 dim pLista : set pLista = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_CHOICELIST,nIdobjFiltr) bquery_where_for_pracownik_filtr = " p.idobj in (0" for each elem in pLista.listElement bquery_where_for_pracownik_filtr = bquery_where_for_pracownik_filtr + "," + cstr(elem.idElement) next bquery_where_for_pracownik_filtr = bquery_where_for_pracownik_filtr + ")" case 3 dim pRaport : set pRaport = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_SEARCHTYPE,nIdobjFiltr) dim pPM: set pPM = doc_.getmodule(60114) dim strButtons: strButtons = "Zastosuj raport" dim strColumns, strDescription, strIds
dim strJoin, strWhere, strOrderBy, strGroupBy
if (pPM.get_search_filter_result(pRaport, _ strButtons, strColumns, _ strJoin, _ strWhere, _ strOrderBy, _ strGroupBy, _ strDescription, strIds)<>1) then exit function else dim cursor : set cursor = trans_.createrawcursor(TYPEID_N5PRACOWNIK,strWhere,strOrderBy,doc_.getmodule(60115).trim_first_join(strJoin)) bquery_where_for_pracownik_filtr = " p.idobj in (0" for each elem in cursor bquery_where_for_pracownik_filtr = bquery_where_for_pracownik_filtr + "," + cstr(elem.idobj) next bquery_where_for_pracownik_filtr = bquery_where_for_pracownik_filtr + ")" end if end select end function
function bquery_promotion_ado(byval pProdukt , byval pGrupaProd , byval pKlient , byval dData)
dim pGrupaKlient: set pGrupaKlient = pKlient.pGrupaKlient dim strKlientWhere:strKlientWhere = " ( " + _ "(wpKlientGrupa_wrt=TYPEID_N5KLIENT and wpKlientGrupa=" + CStr(pKlient.IdObj) + ") or " + _ "(wpKlientGrupa_wrt=TYPEID_N5GRUPAKLIENT and wpKlientGrupa=" + CStr(pGrupaKlient.IdObj) + ") or " + _ "(wpKlientGrupa_wrt=0 and wpKlientGrupa=0)" + _ " ) "
dim strDateWhere:strDateWhere = " ( " + _ " ( " + _ trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL(CDate(dData)) + " BETWEEN dDataOd and dDataDo) or (" + _ trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL(CDate(dData)) + " >= dDataOd and dDataDo = " + trans_.afc.convert.date2SQL( trans_.afc.globals.nulldate() ) + ")" + _ " ) " dim strProdWhere:strProdWhere = "(wpProdGrupa_wrt=TYPEID_N5PRODUKT and wpProdGrupa=" + CStr(pProdukt.IdObj) + ") " dim strGrupaWhere:strGrupaWhere = "(wpProdGrupa_wrt=0 and wpProdGrupa=0)"
dim query:query = _ " select "+select_fld(0) +" from n5polrab where " + strKlientWhere + " and " + strDateWhere + " and " + strProdWhere + vbNewLine + _ " union " + vbNewline + _ " select "+select_fld(0) +" from n5polrab where " + strKlientWhere + " and " + strDateWhere + " and " + strGrupaWhere + vbNewLine dim iter:iter = 0 do while not pGrupaProd is nothing iter = iter + 1 DEBUG_MESSAGE(pGrupaProd.text) query = query + " union " + vbNewLine + _ " select "+select_fld(iter) +" from n5polrab where " + strKlientWhere + " and " + strDateWhere + " and " + "(wpProdGrupa_wrt=TYPEID_N5GRUPAPRODUKTOW and wpProdGrupa=" + CStr(pGrupaProd.IdObj) + ")" + vbNewLine set pGrupaProd = pGrupaProd.pGrupaNadrzedna loop
query = query + " order by 1 desc , dDataOd desc, dDataDo desc "
DEBUG_MESSAGE(query)
bquery_promotion_ado = query end function
private function select_fld (byval n) select_fld = " nPriorytet*100 - "+ cstr(n) +" , * " end function
#comment '-------------------------------------------------------- #comment ' aktualny stan magazynu #comment ' get_stan_mag_for_prod_opak_mag - pobierany z include 50509 #comment '--------------------------------------------------------
